calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Oct-17-2024 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Defendant JORGE MARTINEZ, in pro per present.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF FIRST NATIONAL BANK OF OMAHA's Hearing On Claim Of Exemption.

No appearances made on the first call of this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. During a second call, defendant requests to be heard. The Court allows defendant to present oral argument. Upon conclusion of discussion, the Court takes the matter under submission.

***** After the hearing, the Court signs an order denying defendant's claim of exemption (see signed order for complete ruling.)*****

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-01-2020 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Default Court Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-12-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Jorge A. Martinez.
Dept: 514. Judge: Gerardo C Sandoval. Clerk: Lyssette Bareng. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.
James MacLeod, Esq. appeared for plaintiff First National Bank of Omaha, a National Banking Association.
Joseph Guenther, Recovery Representative for First National Bank of Omaha, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Messrs. MacLeod and Guenther appeared via ZOOM Video Conference for this morning's proceedings.
No appearance by defendant Jorge A. Martinez.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Common Counts was filed on October 17, 2019.
Substitute Service of plaintiff's Summons, Complaint and accompanying documents on defendant Jorge A. Martinez occurred on February 22, 2020, and was effectuated on March 3, 2020.
Default as to defendant Jorge A. Martinez was entered on April 9, 2020.
DOE defendants were dismissed without prejudice on September 2, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff First National Bank of Omaha, a National Banking Association, and against defendant Jorge A. Martinez, as follows:

Principal/Damages - $31,302.80 (Amount pled in complaint).
Prejudgment Interest - WAIVED.
Attorney Fees - WAIVED.
Costs - $627.85.

Total - $31,930.65.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
